findings.element: Overdue Controls table, FRAMEWORK column, row 2
findings.observation: Raw UUID bbb41940-3cd2-4dc3-8805-f680f0f85422 rendered as framework name instead of human-readable test-001
findings.suggestion: Fix data join in overdue controls query to resolve framework UUID to display name
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — UUIDs must never appear in primary display

findings.element: Overdue Controls table, CONTROL NAME column, row 2
findings.observation: CONTROL NAME shows SW-001 — identical to CONTROL ID. Name not resolved.
findings.suggestion: Populate control name from definition or show em dash if unavailable
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — never show duplicated ID in name field

findings.element: Overdue Controls table — inactive framework rows
findings.observation: Table shows controls from ISO 27001, HIPAA, SOC 2 which are not among the 2 active frameworks
findings.suggestion: Scope to active frameworks or add filter/label for inactive
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — scope of data must be consistent with context

findings.observation: Chart exposed as opaque application role with no data table alternative. Completely inaccessible to screen readers.
findings.suggestion: Add visually-hidden data table or role=img with descriptive aria-label

findings.observation: Badge count 80 concatenated into accessible name as 'Alerts 80' — no semantic separation
findings.suggestion: Use aria-label='Alerts, 80 unread' with aria-hidden on visible badge
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — links must have descriptive context-independent labels

findings.observation: favicon.ico returns 404. No product icon in browser tab.
findings.suggestion: Add favicon.ico and apple-touch-icon to web/public/

findings.observation: No perceptible hover state change on Evaluate All, Manage Frameworks, Evaluate, More Actions buttons
findings.suggestion: Add 10-15% lightness shift on hover to button component globally
findings.standard_violated: interaction.md — every clickable element must have distinct hover state

findings.observation: No underline or color shift on hover. Indistinguishable from static text.
findings.suggestion: Add underline on hover and color shift

findings.observation: Title says Last 90 Days but X-axis spans only ~10 days (Mar 25 to Apr 3). Misleading.
findings.suggestion: Dynamically set title to match actual data range or populate full 90 days
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — charts must be labeled honestly

findings.observation: Test/seed artifact name appears throughout page. Unprofessional for client POC.
findings.suggestion: Rename seed data to realistic names
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — no placeholder content visible to users

findings.observation: Table is entirely read-only. No row actions, no View, no Remediate path.
findings.suggestion: Add row-level actions: View Control link to framework detail filtered to that control
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — action paths; interaction.md — table actions

findings.observation: Ring gauge uses green/teal at 75% but status is NON-COMPLIANT. Green signals passing — contradicts the status.
findings.suggestion: Apply semantic color: green for 95%+, amber for 80-94%, red for <80%
findings.standard_violated: visual.md — semantic color mapping; consistency.md — color meaning

findings.observation: 75% labeled NON-COMPLIANT with no threshold context. Users cannot determine what score qualifies as compliant.
findings.suggestion: Add threshold indicator: 'NON-COMPLIANT (threshold: 95%)' or threshold marker on ring gauge
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — compliance data must explain methodology

findings.observation: Dropdown contains only Export Report. Single-item dropdown is an antipattern.
findings.suggestion: Promote Export Report to standalone button. Remove dropdown.

findings.observation: Summary shows '1 OVERDUE CONTROLS' but table header shows 4. Different metrics (1 framework vs 4 controls) without label clarity.
findings.suggestion: Change label to '1 FRAMEWORK WITH OVERDUE CONTROLS' or match the count

findings.observation: Two identical 'View Details' accessible names — screen readers cannot distinguish them
findings.suggestion: Add aria-label='View details for {framework name}'

findings.observation: Two identical 'Evaluate' accessible names — screen readers cannot distinguish them
findings.suggestion: Add aria-label='Evaluate {framework name}'

findings.observation: OVERVIEW, ASSETS, SECURITY etc. are plain StaticText with no semantic grouping role
findings.suggestion: Wrap each group in <ul> with aria-label matching section name

findings.observation: Hover background barely perceptible on non-active items
findings.suggestion: Increase hover background contrast one step
findings.standard_violated: interaction.md — hover must be visually distinct

findings.observation: Rendered as plain text, not badge component. Framework cards use colored badges for same status.
findings.suggestion: Apply same badge component to overall status
findings.standard_violated: consistency.md — same data type same format everywhere

findings.observation: Chart and overdue table below fold with no scroll affordance. Card CTAs cramped.
findings.suggestion: Verify chart height, ensure table scrolls horizontally with visible affordance

findings.observation: Count badge lacks qualifying label — '4 what?'
findings.suggestion: Add text qualifier: '4 overdue controls'

findings.observation: Built-in and custom framework sections have completely different row anatomy
findings.suggestion: Unify card anatomy across both sections

findings.element: Edit/delete icon buttons in framework drawer
findings.observation: No tooltips on hover, no red danger state on delete hover
findings.suggestion: Add tooltips and danger-color hover to delete button
findings.standard_violated: visual.md — icons must pair with label or tooltip

findings.observation: No spinner, disabled state, or Evaluating... feedback when async evaluation is triggered
findings.suggestion: Disabled+spinner state on click until job response returns
findings.standard_violated: interaction.md — async operations must show loading indicator

findings.observation: No axis label identifying what is measured
findings.suggestion: Add rotated Y-axis label: 'Compliance Score (%)'

findings.observation: Shows 'U' / 'User' placeholder instead of actual username
findings.suggestion: Wire auth user display name to sidebar avatar

findings.observation: ALL-CAPS in HTML may cause screen readers to spell out letters
findings.suggestion: Use Title Case in HTML with text-transform: uppercase in CSS

findings.observation: Coming-soon feature button visible in POC demo topbar
findings.suggestion: Remove or style as unavailable for POC

findings.observation: COMPLIANT/NON-COMPLIANT/FAIL all use all-caps — must verify consistency across app
findings.suggestion: Audit all status badge casing across all pages

findings.observation: URLs use raw UUIDs — functional but unfriendly for sharing
findings.suggestion: Consider slug-based routing
